title: Velvety Nutty Egyptian Lamb Biryani
description: A luxurious, nut‑laden lamb biryani infused with a rich Egyptian spice blend, finished in a tandoor‑style oven for a smoky char and creamy coconut‑saffron sauce.
instructions: In a bowl, toss lamb cubes with olive oil, biryani masala, salt, and pepper. Let marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 250 °C (or heat a tandoor) and sear lamb in a hot skillet until browned on all sides.
Transfer lamb to a baking dish and roast in the oven for 25–30 minutes until cooked through.
Meanwhile, rinse basmati rice until water runs clear and soak for 15 minutes.
In a saucepan, combine coconut milk, lamb broth, saffron infusion, sliced onion, and ½ tsp salt. Bring to a gentle simmer.
Drain rice, add to the saucepan, cover, reduce heat to low, and cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until rice is tender.
Remove roasted lamb, shred into bite‑size pieces, and fold into the cooked rice, mixing gently.
Stir in toasted nuts, chopped apricots, a tablespoon of lemon juice, and fresh chopped cilantro & mint. Let rest for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with extra nuts and herbs if desired.
